Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* Reducing the smallness requirement on LNWFS to a simpler one
to be applied to the one step comonad *)


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Coequalizers.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.EqDiag.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.Chains.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.slicecat.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.MonadAlgebras.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.WhiskeredBifunctors.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Arrow.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Three.


New coercion path [fact_functor;
                   functor_data_from_functor;
                   functor_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass is ambiguous with existing 
[fact_section; section_disp_on_objects] : functorial_factorization >-> Funclass.
[ambiguous-paths,coercions,default]

Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.MonoidalHelpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Helpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.LNWFSHelpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.MonoidalHelpers.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.FFMonoidalStructure.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.LNWFSMonoidalStructure.
Require Import UniMath.ModelCategories.Generated.LNWFSCocomplete.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section SmallnessReduction.

Context {C : category}.
Context (CC : Colims C).

Local Definition Ff_mon : monoidal_cat :=
  (_,, @Ff_monoidal C).
Local Definition LNWFS_mon : monoidal_cat :=
  (_,, @LNWFS_tot_monoidal C).

Import BifunctorNotations.
Import MonoidalNotations.

(* lift edge of diagram to morphism between coconeIns *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy u, coconeIn ccy v ⟧


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy u, coconeIn ccy v ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
C ⟦ dob d u, dob d v ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
?h · coconeIn ccy v = coconeIn ccy u · ?k

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
C ⟦ dob d u, dob d v ⟧
 exact (dmor d e).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
dmor d e · coconeIn ccy v =
coconeIn ccy u · identity y
 abstract (
      etrans; [exact (coconeInCommutes ccy _ _ e)|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      apply id_right
    ).
Defined.

(* define a chain of middle objects from a cocone, i.e.
  X0 --> X1 --> X2 --> X3 ...
    \    |f1  f2|     /
   f0 \  |      |   / f3
            Y
  gives a cocone
  K0 --> K1 --> K2 --> K3 ...
    \    |Rf1   |     /
  Rf0 \  |   Rf2|   / Rf3
            Y

*)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
chain C


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
chain C

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
vertex nat_graph → C
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
(λ f : vertex nat_graph → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex nat_graph, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
vertex nat_graph → C
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C

    exact (arrow_dom (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy v))).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
(λ f : vertex nat_graph → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex nat_graph, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph,
   arrow_dom (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy v)))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
C ⟦ arrow_dom (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy u)),
arrow_dom (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy v)) ⟧

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
elifted:= cocone_coconeIn_edge_lifted ccy e: arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy u, coconeIn ccy v ⟧
C ⟦ arrow_dom (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy u)),
arrow_dom (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy v)) ⟧

    exact (arrow_mor00 (#(fact_R F) elifted)).
Defined.

(* define the factorization of a cocone *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) y


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) y

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) v, y ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) v, y ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) v, y ⟧

    exact (fact_R F (coconeIn ccy v)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph,
   three_mor12 (F (coconeIn ccy v)))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      set (elifted := cocone_coconeIn_edge_lifted ccy e);
      etrans; [exact (arrow_mor_comm (#(fact_R F) elifted))|];
      apply id_right
    ).
Defined.

(* define coconeIn to colimArrow morphism for cocone, i.e.
    Xv ----> X∞
    |        |
    |        |
    v        v
    Y ====== Y
*)

C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy v,
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy ⟧


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy v,
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy v,
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy ⟧

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ dob d v, colim (CC nat_graph d) ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
?h · colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy =
coconeIn ccy v · ?k

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ dob d v, colim (CC nat_graph d) ⟧
 exact (colimIn (CC _ d) v).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ y, y ⟧
 exact (identity _).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn (CC nat_graph d) v
· colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy =
coconeIn ccy v · identity y
 abstract (
      etrans; [apply colimArrowCommutes|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      apply id_right
    ).
Defined.

(* define the cocone of right objects with vertex R(colimArrow)
   we will require that this is a colimCocone for the sliced
   R functors to be small *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) v,
arrow_dom
  (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)) ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) v,
arrow_dom
  (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)) ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccy) v,
arrow_dom
  (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)) ⟧

    exact (arrow_mor00 (#(fact_R F) (coconeIn_colimArrow_mor ccy v))).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph,
   arrow_mor00
     (# (fact_R F) (coconeIn_colimArrow_mor ccy v)))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      etrans; [use (pr1_section_disp_on_morphisms_comp F)|];
      use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); [
        exact (colimInCommutes (CC _ d) _ _ e)|apply id_left
      ]
    ).
Defined.

(* define smallness of (sliced) R functor *)
Definition FR_slice_omega_small (F : Ff C) : UU :=
    ∏ (d : chain C) (y : C) (ccy : cocone d y),
      isColimCocone _ _ (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy).

(* a chain in arrow C from a cocone in C *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
chain (arrow C)


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
chain (arrow C)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
vertex nat_graph → arrow C
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
(λ f : vertex nat_graph → arrow C,
 ∏ a b : vertex nat_graph,
 edge a b → arrow C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧) ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
vertex nat_graph → arrow C
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
arrow C

    exact (coconeIn ccy v).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
(λ f : vertex nat_graph → arrow C,
 ∏ a b : vertex nat_graph,
 edge a b → arrow C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph, coconeIn ccy v)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
u, v: vertex nat_graph
e: edge u v
arrow C ⟦ coconeIn ccy u, coconeIn ccy v ⟧

    exact (cocone_coconeIn_edge_lifted ccy e).
Defined.

(* we need that the colimArrow into the codomain y
   is a colimit for the chain in arrow C *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
arrow C ⟦ dob (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) v,
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
arrow C ⟦ dob (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) v,
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
arrow C ⟦ dob (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) v,
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy ⟧

    exact (coconeIn_colimArrow_mor ccy v).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph,
   coconeIn_colimArrow_mor ccy v)
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      use arrow_mor_eq; [|apply id_left];
      exact (colimInCommutes (CC _ d) _ _ e)
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
cocone (project_diagram00 d) (arrow_dom cl)


C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
cocone (project_diagram00 d) (arrow_dom cl)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (project_diagram00 d) v, arrow_dom cl ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
forms_cocone (project_diagram00 d) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (project_diagram00 d) v, arrow_dom cl ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ dob (project_diagram00 d) v, arrow_dom cl ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor00 (coconeIn cc v)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
forms_cocone (project_diagram00 d)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph, arrow_mor00 (coconeIn cc v))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      exact (arrow_mor00_eq (coconeInCommutes cc _ _ e))
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
cocone (project_diagram11 d) (arrow_cod cl)


C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
cocone (project_diagram11 d) (arrow_cod cl)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (project_diagram11 d) v, arrow_cod cl ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
forms_cocone (project_diagram11 d) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C ⟦ dob (project_diagram11 d) v, arrow_cod cl ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
v: vertex nat_graph
C ⟦ dob (project_diagram11 d) v, arrow_cod cl ⟧
 exact (arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
cl: arrow C
d: chain (arrow C)
cc: cocone d cl
forms_cocone (project_diagram11 d)
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph, arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      exact (arrow_mor11_eq (coconeInCommutes cc _ _ e))
    ).
Defined.


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) y


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cocone (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) y

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C
⟦ dob (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) v,
y ⟧

CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) ?f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
C
⟦ dob (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) v,
y ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
v: vertex nat_graph
C
⟦ dob (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) v,
y ⟧
 exact (identity y).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
forms_cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (λ _ : vertex nat_graph, identity y)
 abstract (intros u v e; apply id_left).
Defined.

(* We also need that y is a colimit for the chain on
   the codomains *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) y
  (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy)


C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isColimCocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) y
  (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
∃! x : C ⟦ y, cl ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc x

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
C ⟦ y, cl ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc ?x
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
∏ y0 : C ⟦ y, cl ⟧,
isaprop
  (is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc
     y0)
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
∏ y0 : C ⟦ y, cl ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc y0
→ y0 = ?x

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
C ⟦ y, cl ⟧
 exact (coconeIn cc 0).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc
  (coconeIn cc 0)
 abstract (
      intro v;
      induction v as [|v Hv]; [apply id_left|];
      etrans; [exact Hv|];
      etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (coconeInCommutes cc _ _ (idpath (S v))))|];
      apply id_left
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
∏ y0 : C ⟦ y, cl ⟧,
isaprop
  (is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc
     y0)
 abstract (intro; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: C
cc: cocone
  (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) cl
∏ y0 : C ⟦ y, cl ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone ccy) cc y0
→ y0 = coconeIn cc 0
 abstract (
      intros x ccx;
      etrans; [|exact (ccx 0)];
      apply pathsinv0;
      apply id_left
    ).
Defined.

Definition cocone_arrow_chain_y_ColimCocone
    {d : chain C} {y : C}
    (ccy : cocone d y) :
  ColimCocone (project_diagram11 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) :=
    make_ColimCocone _ _ _ (cocone_arrow_chain_y_cocone_isColimCocone ccy).

  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)

∏ v : vertex nat_graph,

C ⟦ y, pr21 cl ⟧

d: chain C
y: C

cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,

C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
identity y · arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc 0) =
arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)
C ⟦ colim (CC nat_graph d), pr11 cl ⟧
 exact (colimArrow (CC _ _) _ (project_arrow_cocone00 cc)).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
identity y · arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc 0) =
arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)
C ⟦ y, pr21 cl ⟧
 exact (colimArrow (cocone_arrow_chain_y_ColimCocone ccy) _ (project_arrow_cocone11 cc)).
    
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
identity y · arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc 0) =
arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)
colimArrow
  (CC nat_graph
     (project_diagram00 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)))
  (arrow_dom cl) (project_arrow_cocone00 cc) · pr2 cl =
colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy
· colimArrow (cocone_arrow_chain_y_ColimCocone ccy)
    (arrow_cod cl) (project_arrow_cocone11 cc)
 abstract (
        use colimArrowUnique';
        intro v;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition; apply colimArrowCommutes|];
        apply pathsinv0;
        etrans; [apply assoc|];
        etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition; apply colimArrowCommutes|];
        etrans; [|exact (pathsinv0 (arrow_mor_comm (coconeIn cc v)))];
        apply cancel_precomposition;
        induction v as [|v Hv]; [reflexivity|];
        etrans; [exact Hv|];
        etrans; [exact (pathsinv0 (arrow_mor11_eq (coconeInCommutes cc _ _ (idpath (S v)))))|];
        apply id_left
      ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
identity y · arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc 0) =
arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)
is_cocone_mor (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy) cc
  (mors_to_arrow_mor
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy) (pr2 cl)
     (colimArrow
        (CC nat_graph
           (project_diagram00 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)))
        (arrow_dom cl) (project_arrow_cocone00 cc))
     (colimArrow
        (cocone_arrow_chain_y_ColimCocone ccy)
        (arrow_cod cl) (project_arrow_cocone11 cc))
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone_subproof0
        d y ccy cl cc))
 abstract (
      intro v;
      use arrow_mor_eq; [apply colimArrowCommutes|];
      exact (Hcin v)
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
identity y · arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc 0) =
arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)
∏
y0 : arrow C ⟦ colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy, cl ⟧,
isaprop
  (is_cocone_mor (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy) cc y0)
 abstract (intro x; apply impred; intro; apply homset_property).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
cl: arrow C
cc: cocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) cl
Hcin: ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
identity y · arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc 0) =
arrow_mor11 (coconeIn cc v)
∏
y0 : arrow C ⟦ colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy, cl ⟧,
is_cocone_mor (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy) cc y0
→ y0 =
  mors_to_arrow_mor
    (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy) (pr2 cl)
    (colimArrow
       (CC nat_graph
          (project_diagram00 (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)))
       (arrow_dom cl) (project_arrow_cocone00 cc))
    (colimArrow (cocone_arrow_chain_y_ColimCocone ccy)
       (arrow_cod cl) (project_arrow_cocone11 cc))
    (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone_subproof0 d
       y ccy cl cc)
 abstract (
      intros x ccx;
      use arrow_mor_eq; [
        use colimArrowUnique;
        intro v;
        exact (arrow_mor00_eq (ccx v))|
      ];
      use (colimArrowUnique' (cocone_arrow_chain_y_ColimCocone ccy));
      intro v;
      etrans; [exact (arrow_mor11_eq (ccx v))|];
      apply pathsinv0;
      exact (Hcin v)
    ).
Defined.

Definition colimArrow_arrow_ColimCocone
    {d : chain C} {y : C}
    (ccy : cocone d y) :
  ColimCocone (cocone_arrow_chain ccy) :=
    make_ColimCocone _ _ _ (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy).

(* now we can show that the sliced R functor is omega small
   whenever the L functor preserves chains in arrow C *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
→ FR_slice_omega_small F


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
→ FR_slice_omega_small F

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
FR_slice_omega_small F

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isColimCocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)

  (* intros cl cc. *)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isHLCC:= HL (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
isColimCocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)

  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
HLCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
isColimCocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C

  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))

  (mapcocone (fact_L F)

     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
isColimCocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C

  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
HLCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC
     (fact_L F
        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
isColimCocone (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)

  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)

  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)

  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)

     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC

     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC

        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy))
     (arrow_dom
        (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
     (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy))

CC: Colims C

d: chain C
y: C

  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))

  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC
     (fact_L F
        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy))
     (arrow_dom
        (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
     (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy))
  (arrow_mor11 (pr1 base_mor))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph

y: C

  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
HLCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC
     (fact_L F
        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
colimArrow (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy))
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 base_mor) =
identity
  (colim (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)))
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isHLCC:= HL (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
HLCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC
     (fact_L F
        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
arrow_mor11 (pr1 base_mor)
· colimArrow (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy))
    (arrow_dom
       (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
    (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy) =
identity
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isHLCC:= HL (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
HLCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC
     (fact_L F
        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
colimArrow (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy))
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy)
· arrow_mor11 (pr1 base_mor) =
identity
  (colim (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy)))
 abstract (
      apply pathsinv0;
      use colim_endo_is_identity;
      intro v;
      etrans; [apply assoc|];
      etrans; [apply cancel_postcomposition; apply colimArrowCommutes|];
      exact (arrow_mor11_eq (colimArrowCommutes HLCC _ (colimCocone baseCC) v))
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
HL: preserves_colimits_of_shape (fact_L F) nat_graph
d: chain C
y: C
ccy: cocone d y
isHLCC:= HL (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
  (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)
  (colimArrow_arrow_cocone_isColimCocone ccy): isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy))
HLCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
  (fact_L F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F) 
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
baseCC:= arrow_colims CC nat_graph
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (mapdiagram (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)) baseCC
  (fact_L F
     (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
  (mapcocone (fact_L F)
     (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
     (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)) isHLCC: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC
     (fact_L F
        (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy))
     (mapcocone (fact_L F)
        (cocone_arrow_chain ccy)
        (colimArrow_arrow_cocone ccy)))
arrow_mor11 (pr1 base_mor)
· colimArrow (CC nat_graph (fact_cocone_chain F ccy))
    (arrow_dom
       (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
    (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F ccy) =
identity
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F (colimArrow (CC nat_graph d) y ccy)))
 abstract (
      etrans; [|exact (arrow_mor11_eq (pr22 base_mor))];
      apply cancel_precomposition;
      use colimArrowUnique;
      intro v;
      etrans; [apply colimArrowCommutes|];
      reflexivity
    ).
Qed.

(* we get some issues with equality of diagrams, but
   given a chain d of functorial factorizations,
   the chain of middle objects of F ⊗ d is
   in fact the same as the cocone we just constructed
   for the right maps of all the factorizations
   (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R)
*)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
eq_diag (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
eq_diag (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v =
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f) v
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
(λ eq_v : ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
          dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v =
          dob
            (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
               (mapdiagram
                  (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
                  d) f) v,
 ∏ (v v' : vertex nat_graph) 
 (f0 : edge v v'),
 transportf
   (λ obj : C,
    C ⟦ obj, dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v'
    ⟧) (eq_v v)
   (dmor (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) f0) =
 transportb
   (λ obj : C,
    C
    ⟦ dob
        (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
           (mapdiagram
              (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f)
        v, obj ⟧) (eq_v v')
   (dmor
      (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
         (mapdiagram
            (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f)
      f0)) ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v =
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f) v
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
v: vertex nat_graph
dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v =
dob
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f) v

    reflexivity.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
(λ eq_v : ∏ v : vertex nat_graph,
          dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v =
          dob
            (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
               (mapdiagram
                  (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
                  d) f) v,
 ∏ (v v' : vertex nat_graph) (f0 : edge v v'),
 transportf
   (λ obj : C,
    C ⟦ obj, dob (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) v'
    ⟧) (eq_v v)
   (dmor (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise) f0) =
 transportb
   (λ obj : C,
    C
    ⟦ dob
        (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
           (mapdiagram
              (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f)
        v, obj ⟧) (eq_v v')
   (dmor
      (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
         (mapdiagram
            (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f)
      f0))
  (λ v : vertex nat_graph,
   idpath
     (dob
        (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
           (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) f)
        v))
 abstract (
      intros u v e;
      apply pathsinv0;
      etrans;[ use pr1_transportf_const|];
      etrans;[ apply id_left|];
      apply (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); reflexivity
    ).
Defined.

(* The ColimCocone we get from the R map of F being omega small,
   corrected for the equality of diagrams *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
isHRCC':= HR (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise: isColimCocone
  (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F
     ccpointwise)
ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)


  (* correct codomain with equality of diagrams *)
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
isHRCC':= HR (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise: isColimCocone
  (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F
     ccpointwise)
eqdiag:= fact_cocone_chain_eq_chain_pointwise_tensored
  F d f: let ccpointwise := Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f
  in
eq_diag (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
isHRCC':= HR (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise: isColimCocone
  (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
  (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F
     ccpointwise)
eqdiag:= fact_cocone_chain_eq_chain_pointwise_tensored
  F d f: let ccpointwise := Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f
  in
eq_diag (fact_cocone_chain F ccpointwise)
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
isHRCC:= eq_diag_iscolimcocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f) eqdiag isHRCC': isColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
  (make_eq_diag_cocone
     (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
        (mapdiagram
           (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
           d) f) eqdiag
     (dom_fact_R_colimArrow_cocone F
        ccpointwise))
ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  exact (make_ColimCocone _ _ _ isHRCC).
Defined.

(* The z-iso on middle objects we obtain from this ColimCocone
   to the colimit we obtain from CC itself on this diagram.
   This isomorphism is the one we need for the isomorphism of
   functorial factorizations. *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
ccpointwise:= Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f: cocone (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f)
  (arrow_cod f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
        d) f) baseCC (colim HRCC)
  (pr21 HRCC)
  (isColimCocone_from_ColimCocone HRCC): is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow baseCC (colim HRCC)
     (pr21 HRCC))
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))


  exact (_,, base_mor).
Defined.

(* colimIn _ v to the ColimCocone with R(colimArrow) as vertex
   is the same as the right functor of F applied to
   colimIn (ChainsFf CC d) v, since this is how we defined
   ChainsFf CC d
   We have to rewrite this sometimes *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
v: vertex nat_graph
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_R F)
     (three_mor_mor12
        (section_nat_trans (colimIn CL v) f))) =
colimIn HRCC v


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
v: vertex nat_graph
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
arrow_mor00
  (# (fact_R F)
     (three_mor_mor12
        (section_nat_trans (colimIn CL v) f))) =
colimIn HRCC v

  use (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); reflexivity.
Qed.

(* Show that the base_iso we just defined in fact gives a
   morphism of three C, pointwise *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
base_mor:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: z_iso
  (colim
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
        (mapdiagram
           (monoidal_left_tensor
              (F : Ff_mon)) d) f))
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f)
           (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f))))
three_mor01 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)
· z_iso_inv base_mor =
identity (three_ob0 (colim FfCC f))
· three_mor01 (colim FfCC f)
× three_mor12 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)
  · identity (three_ob2 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)) =
  z_iso_inv base_mor · three_mor12 (colim FfCC f)

           (arrow_cod f)
           (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f))))

· z_iso_inv base_mor =
identity (three_ob0 (colim FfCC f))
· three_mor01 (colim FfCC f)
× three_mor12 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)
  · identity (three_ob2 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)) =
  z_iso_inv base_mor · three_mor12 (colim FfCC f)

     f)

CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)

  F d HR f: z_iso
  (colim
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
        (mapdiagram
           (monoidal_left_tensor
              (F : Ff_mon)) d) f))
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
three_mor01 (dob d 0 f)
· (three_mor01 ((F : Ff_mon) (fact_R (dob d 0) f))
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
          (mapdiagram
             (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f)
       0) =
three_mor01 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)
· z_iso_inv base_mor

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
base_mor:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: z_iso
  (colim
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
        (mapdiagram
           (monoidal_left_tensor
              (F : Ff_mon)) d) f))
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f)
           (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f))))
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
three_mor01 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)
· z_iso_inv base_mor =
three_mor01 (dob d 0 f)
· (three_mor01 (F (fact_R (dob d 0) f))
   · colimIn
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
          (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) f) 0)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
f: arrow C
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
base_mor:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: z_iso
  (colim
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
        (mapdiagram
           (monoidal_left_tensor
              (F : Ff_mon)) d) f))
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f)
           (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f))))
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
baseCC:= CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

d: chain Ff_mon

f: arrow C

           (arrow_cod f)
           (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f))))

  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1

     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)

  (Ff_cocone_pointwise_R
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) f) v

    apply id_right.
Qed.

(* define the natural transformation we want from
   (F ⊗_{Ff_mon} (colim CL)) (colim FfCC)
   using the z_iso we got from the smallness. *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL)
  (colim FfCC)


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
section_nat_trans_disp_data (F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL)
  (colim FfCC)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
(F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f -->[
identity f] colim FfCC f

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
base_mor:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
(F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f -->[
identity f] colim FfCC f


  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
base_mor:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
pr12 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f) · z_iso_inv base_mor =
pr11 (identity f) · pr12 (colim FfCC f)
× pr122 ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim CL) f)
  · pr21 (identity f) =
  z_iso_inv base_mor · pr122 (colim FfCC f)

  exact (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise_three_comm F d HR f).
Defined.

(* this proof is a mess, but I had to rewrite γ within a
   #F γ... *)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
     F d HR)


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon

CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
section_nat_trans_disp_axioms
  (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
     F d HR)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim (ChainsFf CC d)) f)
     (colim
        (ChainsFf CC
           (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)) g))
  (id_right γ @ ! id_left γ)
  (section_disp_on_morphisms
     (F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim (ChainsFf CC d)) γ ;; FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
                                                 F d
                                                 HR g)%mor_disp =
(FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
   F d HR f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                 (colim
                    (ChainsFf CC
                       (mapdiagram
                          (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)))
                 γ)%mor_disp

pr1

        ((F ⊗_{ Ff_mon} colim (ChainsFf CC d)) f)

HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
?b =
colimIn HRCC v
· pr1
    (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
       F d HR f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     (colim
                        (ChainsFf CC
                        (mapdiagram
                        (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)))
                     γ)%mor_disp

d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R (dob d v)) γ
      · three_mor_mor12
          (section_nat_trans (colimIn CL v) g)))
· pr1
    (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
       F d HR g) =
colimIn HRCC v
· pr1
    (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
       F d HR f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     (colim
                        (ChainsFf CC
                        (mapdiagram
                        (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)))
                     γ)%mor_disp

             
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
mor:= three_mor_mor12
  (section_nat_trans (colimIn CL v) g): arrow C
⟦ three_mor12 (section_functor (dob d v) g),
three_mor12 (section_functor (colim CL) g) ⟧
arrow_mor11 (# (fact_R (dob d v)) γ · mor) =
pr21 (# (fact_R (colim (ChainsFf CC d))) γ)

HRCCg:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F
  d HR g: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     g)
colimIn HRCCg v
· pr1
    (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
       F d HR g) = ?f'

    apply (colimArrowCommutes HRCCg).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R (dob d v)) γ))
· coconeIn
    (colimCocone
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
          (mapdiagram
             (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d) g))
    v =
colimIn HRCC v
· pr1
    (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_data
       F d HR f ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                     (colim
                        (ChainsFf CC
                           (mapdiagram
                              (monoidal_left_tensor F)
                              d))) γ)%mor_disp

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
coconeIn
  (colimCocone
     (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
        (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) f)) v
· pr1

             (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)))
       γ) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram

     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
?b =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R (dob d v)) γ))

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f, g: arrow C
γ: arrow C ⟦ f, g ⟧
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
v: vertex nat_graph
(λ v : vertex nat_graph,
 let Dv :=
   dob (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) v in
 pr1 (section_disp_on_morphisms Dv γ)) v
· colimIn
    (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
       (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) g) v =
pr1
  (section_disp_on_morphisms F
     (# (fact_R (dob d v)) γ))
· coconeIn
    (colimCocone
       (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
          (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) g))
    v

  reflexivity.
Qed.

Definition FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
    (F : Ff C)
    (d : chain Ff_mon)
    (HR : FR_slice_omega_small F)
    (CL := ChainsFf CC d)
    (FfCC := ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)) :
  (F ⊗_{Ff_mon} (colim CL)) --> (colim FfCC) :=
    (_,, FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_axioms F d HR).

(* Use the morphism to show that indeed, F in Ff C
  has the smallness property if fact_R F does*)

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FR_slice_omega_small F
→ isColimCocone
    (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
    (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon) (colim CL))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d
       (colimCocone CL))


C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
FR_slice_omega_small F
→ isColimCocone
    (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
    (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon) (colim CL))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d
       (colimCocone CL))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon) (colim CL))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d
     (colimCocone CL))


  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon) (colim CL))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d
     (colimCocone CL))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCC
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon) (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d
        (colimCocone CL)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)))
  (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
     F d HR)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
     (colimCocone CL))
· FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
    F d HR = identity (colim FfCC)
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor F
  d HR
· colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
       (colimCocone CL)) =
identity (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
     (colimCocone CL))
· FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
    F d HR = identity (colim FfCC)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (colimArrow FfCC
        (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
           (colimCocone CL))
      · FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
          F d HR) f) =
pr1 (pr1 (identity (colim FfCC)) f)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
pr1
  (pr1
     (colimArrow FfCC
        (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
           (colimCocone CL))
      · FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
          F d HR) f) =
pr1 (pr1 (identity (colim FfCC)) f)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
pr1
  (pr1
     (colimArrow FfCC
        (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
           (colimCocone CL))
      · FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
          F d HR) f) =
pr1 (pr1 (identity (colim FfCC)) f)


    
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
pr1
  (pr1
     (colimArrow FfCC
        (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
           (colimCocone CL))
      · FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
          F d HR) f) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
?b = pr1 (pr1 (identity (colim FfCC)) f)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon

HR: FR_slice_omega_small F

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1

        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in

       d) in

    (mapdiagram

       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
pr1
  (colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)) f ;; FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
                                 F d HR f)%mor_disp =
pr1 (pr1 (identity (colim FfCC)) f)

base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in

        (colimCocone CL)) f ;; 
   FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
     F d HR f)%mor_disp

CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in

∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn
  (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f) u · pr1 base_iso =
coconeIn
  (LNWFSCocomplete.cocone_pointwise
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)) f) u

  (LNWFSCocomplete.cocone_pointwise
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)
     (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)) f) v = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
v: vertex nat_graph
?b =
coconeIn
  (pr21 (FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored
           F d HR f)) v

pr1

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor F
  d HR
· colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
       (colimCocone CL)) =
identity (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon

HR: FR_slice_omega_small F

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
pr1
  (pr1
     (FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor
        F d HR
      · colimArrow FfCC
          (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
          (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
             (colimCocone CL))) f) =
pr1
  (pr1 (identity (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL)))
     f)

     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
pr1 base_iso =
pr1
  (colimArrow FfCC (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)) f)

    
C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn
  (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d) f) u
· pr1 base_iso =
coconeIn
  (LNWFSCocomplete.cocone_pointwise
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)
     (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)) f) u

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon

  (mapdiagram

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1

        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)

  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in

    (mapdiagram

       d) in
