     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)
     (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))

           F d HR f)) v =

  (LNWFSCocomplete.cocone_pointwise
     (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor F) d)
     (monoidal_left_tensor F (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor F) d
        (colimCocone CL)) f) v

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)

  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in

    (mapdiagram

       d) in

              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
v: vertex nat_graph
pr1
  ((identity F ⊗^{ pr2 Ff_mon}_{r} dob d v) f ;; (F
                                                 ⊗^{ 
                                                 pr2
                                                 Ff_mon}_{l} 
                                                 coconeIn
                                                 (colimCocone
                                                 CL) v)
                                                 f)%mor_disp =
coconeIn
  (pr21 (FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored
           F d HR f)) v

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)

  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1

  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in

C: category
CC: Colims C
F: Ff C
d: chain Ff_mon
CL:= ChainsFf CC d: ColimCocone d
HR: FR_slice_omega_small F
FfCC:= ChainsFf CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
f: arrow C
HRCC:= FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored F d
  HR f: ColimCocone
  (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1
     (mapdiagram
        (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon)) d)
     f)
base_iso:= FR_lt_preserves_colim_impl_Ff_lt_preserves_colim_mor_pointwise
  F d HR f: let CL := ChainsFf CC d in
let FfCC :=
  ChainsFf CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) in
let ccpointwise :=
  Ff_cocone_pointwise_R d f in
let baseCC :=
  CCFf_pt_ob1 CC
    (mapdiagram
       (monoidal_left_tensor (F : Ff_mon))
       d) f in
z_iso (colim baseCC)
  (arrow_dom
     (fact_R F
        (colimArrow
           (CC nat_graph
              (Ff_diagram_pointwise_ob1 d f))
           (arrow_cod f) ccpointwise)))
v: vertex nat_graph
pr1
  ((F ⊗^{ pr2 Ff_mon}_{l} coconeIn (colimCocone CL) v)
     f) =
coconeIn
  (pr21 (FR_slice_colimcocone_over_pointwise_tensored
           F d HR f)) v

    apply (section_disp_on_eq_morphisms F); reflexivity.
Qed.

Context (L : total_category (LNWFS C))
        (d : chain LNWFS_mon)
        (CL := ChainsLNWFS CC d)
        (dbase := mapdiagram (pr1_category _) d)
        (Ldbase := mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)) dbase)
        (FfCCbase := ChainsFf CC Ldbase)
        (LNWFSCC := ChainsLNWFS CC (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d)).

Opaque LNWFS_tot_lcomp.
Opaque Ff_lcomp.
Opaque Ff_precategory_data.
Opaque LNWFS.

Section Helpers.

Context (HF : isColimCocone _ _
          (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)) _ (project_cocone _ _ (colimCocone CL))))
        (LNWFSarr := colimArrow LNWFSCC _ (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) _ (colimCocone CL)))
        (base_mor := isColim_is_z_iso _ FfCCbase _ _ HF)
        (Ffiso := (_,, base_mor) : z_iso _ _).

(* commutativity of project_cocone for
    pr1_category and monoidal_left_tensor *)
Section ProjectCoconeComm.

Opaque base_mor.
Opaque ColimFfCocone.
Opaque ColimLNWFSCocone.
Opaque CL.


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
coconeIn
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) v =
colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
coconeIn
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) v =
colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr =
coconeIn
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) v

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
f: arrow C
pr1 (pr1 (colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr) f) =
pr1
  (pr1
     (coconeIn
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
           (project_cocone d (colim CL)
              (colimCocone CL))) v) f)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
f: arrow C
pr1 (pr1 (colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr) f) = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
f: arrow C
?b =
pr1
  (pr1
     (coconeIn
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
           (project_cocone d 
              (colim CL) 
              (colimCocone CL))) v) f)
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
f: arrow C
pr1 (colimIn FfCCbase v f ;; pr1 LNWFSarr f)%mor_disp =
pr1
  (pr1
     (coconeIn
        (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
           (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
           (project_cocone d (colim CL)
              (colimCocone CL))) v) f)

  exact (colimArrowCommutes (CCFf_pt_ob1 CC Ldbase f) _ _ v).
Qed.


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
Ffiso = pr1 LNWFSarr


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
Ffiso = pr1 LNWFSarr

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn FfCCbase u · Ffiso =
colimIn FfCCbase u · pr1 LNWFSarr

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))

  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram

           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn FfCCbase v · Ffiso =
colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))

        (colimCocone CL)))

  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)

     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn FfCCbase v · Ffiso = ?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))

     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))

  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
?b = colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
coconeIn
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) v =
colimIn FfCCbase v · pr1 LNWFSarr

  exact (Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_mor_disp_subproof v).
Qed.

End ProjectCoconeComm.

(* showing that the morphism induced the the universal
property of the colimit in Ff C is indeed an LNWFS morphism.
we do this by reducing it to the pointwise case. *)
Section DispMor.

Opaque base_mor.
Opaque ColimFfCocone.
Opaque ColimLNWFSCocone.
Opaque CL.
Opaque LNWFSCC.
Opaque Ffiso LNWFSarr.


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr2 (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL)) -->[
pr1 base_mor] pr2 (colim LNWFSCC)


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr2 (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL)) -->[
pr1 base_mor] pr2 (colim LNWFSCC)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone

     d)

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone

  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr2 (colim LNWFSCC) -->[
Ffiso] pr2 (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr1 LNWFSarr = Ffiso

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
Ffiso = pr1 LNWFSarr

  exact (Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_mor_disp_pr1_category_tensor_commutes).
Qed.

End DispMor.

Section InvInPrecat.

Opaque base_mor.
Opaque ColimFfCocone.
Opaque CL.
Opaque FfCCbase.


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) =
pr1
  (colimArrow LNWFSCC
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
        d (colimCocone CL)))


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon

           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram

Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone

     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) =
pr1
  (colimArrow LNWFSCC
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
        d (colimCocone CL)))

     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
∏ u : vertex nat_graph,
colimIn FfCCbase u
· colimArrow FfCCbase
    (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
       (pr1 (colim CL)))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
       (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) =
colimIn FfCCbase u
· pr1
    (colimArrow LNWFSCC
       (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
          (colim CL))
       (mapcocone
          (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
          (colimCocone CL)))

· colimArrow FfCCbase

C: category

d: chain LNWFS_mon

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))

colimIn FfCCbase v
· colimArrow FfCCbase
    (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L) (pr1 (colim CL)))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
       (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
       (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) =
?b
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
?b =
colimIn FfCCbase v
· pr1
    (colimArrow LNWFSCC
       (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
       (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
          (colimCocone CL)))
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
coconeIn
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) v =
colimIn FfCCbase v
· pr1
    (colimArrow LNWFSCC
       (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
       (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
          (colimCocone CL)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
v: vertex nat_graph
colimIn FfCCbase v
· pr1
    (colimArrow LNWFSCC
       (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
       (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
          (colimCocone CL))) =
coconeIn
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))) v

  exact (colimArrowCommutes FfCCbase _ _ v).
Qed.

Opaque ColimLNWFSCocone.
Opaque LNWFSCC.
Opaque Ffiso LNWFSarr.


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1
     (colimArrow LNWFSCC
        (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
           (colim CL))
        (mapcocone
           (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
           (colimCocone CL)))) (pr1 base_mor)


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1
     (colimArrow LNWFSCC
        (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
           (colim CL))
        (mapcocone
           (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
           (colimCocone CL)))) (pr1 base_mor)

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr1
  (colimArrow LNWFSCC
     (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
        (colimCocone CL))) · pr1 base_mor =
identity (pr1 (colim LNWFSCC))
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr1 base_mor
· pr1
    (colimArrow LNWFSCC
       (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
       (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
          (colimCocone CL))) =
identity (pr1 (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr1
  (colimArrow LNWFSCC
     (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
        (colimCocone CL))) · pr1 base_mor =
identity (pr1 (colim LNWFSCC))
 use (pathscomp1 (pr12 base_mor) _); [|reflexivity];
    apply (cancel_postcomposition _ _ (pr1 base_mor));
    exact Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_inv_in_precat_subproof.
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
LNWFSarr:= colimArrow LNWFSCC
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
     (colim CL))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d (colimCocone CL)): total_category (LNWFS C) ⟦ 
colim LNWFSCC,
monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
  (colim CL) ⟧
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
Ffiso:= colimArrow FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))),, base_mor: z_iso (colim FfCCbase)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
pr1 base_mor
· pr1
    (colimArrow LNWFSCC
       (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL))
       (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor L) d
          (colimCocone CL))) =
identity (pr1 (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL)))
 use (pathscomp1 (pr22 base_mor)); [|reflexivity];
    apply (cancel_precomposition _ _ _ _ _ _ (pr1 base_mor));
    exact Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_inv_in_precat_subproof.
Qed.

End InvInPrecat.

End Helpers.


C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL) (colimCocone CL)))
→ isColimCocone
    (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
       d)
    (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
       d (colimCocone CL))

FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone

     d)
isColimCocone

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)

→ isColimCocone

       d)
    (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
    (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
       d (colimCocone CL))

  (mapdiagram

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)

        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
isColimCocone

C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
     (colimCocone CL))

d: chain LNWFS_mon

  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon

LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)

        (colimCocone CL)))

  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
