        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d)
  (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
  (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
     (colimCocone CL))


  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
HFCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow LNWFSCC
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
     (mapcocone (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
        d (colimCocone CL)))

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
HFCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL),
colim LNWFSCC ⟧
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
HFCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
(λ g : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ monoidal_left_tensor 
           (L : LNWFS_mon) 
           (colim CL), colim LNWFSCC ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (colimArrow LNWFSCC
      (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
      (mapcocone
         (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
         (colimCocone CL))) g) 
  ?pr1

  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
HFCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
total_category (LNWFS C)
⟦ monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL),
colim LNWFSCC ⟧
 
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
HFCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
pr2 (monoidal_left_tensor L (colim CL)) -->[
pr1 base_mor] pr2 (colim LNWFSCC)

    abstract (
      exact (Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_mor_disp HF)
    ).
  
C: category
CC: Colims C
L: total_category (LNWFS C)
d: chain LNWFS_mon
CL:= ChainsLNWFS CC d: ColimCocone d
dbase:= mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d: chain (Ff C)
Ldbase:= mapdiagram
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
  dbase: chain Ff_mon
FfCCbase:= ChainsFf CC Ldbase: ColimCocone Ldbase
LNWFSCC:= ChainsLNWFS CC
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d): ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon))
     d)
HF: isColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL)))
HFCC:= make_ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: ColimCocone
  (mapdiagram
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d))
base_mor:= isColim_is_z_iso Ldbase FfCCbase
  (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon)
     (pr1 (colim CL)))
  (mapcocone
     (monoidal_left_tensor (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
     (mapdiagram (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
     (project_cocone d (colim CL)
        (colimCocone CL))) HF: is_z_isomorphism
  (colimArrow FfCCbase
     (monoidal_left_tensor 
        (pr1 L : Ff_mon) 
        (pr1 (colim CL)))
     (mapcocone
        (monoidal_left_tensor
           (pr1 L : Ff_mon))
        (mapdiagram
           (pr1_category (LNWFS C)) d)
        (project_cocone d 
           (colim CL) (colimCocone CL))))
base_inv:= colimArrow FfCCbase (colim HFCC)
  (colimCocone HFCC): Ff C ⟦ colim FfCCbase, colim HFCC ⟧
(λ g : total_category (LNWFS C)
       ⟦ monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)
           (colim CL), colim LNWFSCC ⟧,
 is_inverse_in_precat
   (colimArrow LNWFSCC
      (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon) (colim CL))
      (mapcocone
         (monoidal_left_tensor (L : LNWFS_mon)) d
         (colimCocone CL))) g)
  (pr1 base_mor,,
   Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_subproof
     HF)

    abstract (
      apply LNWFS_inv_in_precat_if_Ff_inv_in_precat;
      exact (Ff_lt_preserves_colim_impl_LNWFS_lt_preserves_colim_inv_in_precat HF)
    ).
Qed.

End SmallnessReduction.
